meta.listDescription: Browse common questions and find answers quickly.
meta.categoryDescription: Browse the frequently asked questions for this category.

public.title: Help Center
public.description: Find clear answers to the most common questions.
public.categoriesNote: Choose a category or use search to jump straight to an answer.

faq.heading: Frequently asked questions
faq.note: Tap a question to read the full answer.

error.heading: Unable to load the help center
error.note: Please try again in a moment.

notFound.heading: Category not found
notFound.note: The link may be invalid or the category name may have changed.

empty.heading: No questions are available right now
empty.note: More answers will be added soon.

noResults.note: Try a different keyword or choose another category.

document.title: Frequently asked questions
document.subtitle: Browse questions by category and jump to the right answer quickly.
document.intro: Choose a category or use search to quickly reach clear answers.

notice.title: Important note
notice.body: The actual answer appears inside the question content before it is applied, based on the category and search.
notice.supportBody: If you think your case needs special review, you can contact support.
